# Fostering the creation of decent and sustainable work for all.
The SME Founders Association (or SFA) supports Small and Medium Enterprise owners to access markets, affordable competent talent, and capital as a strategy to foster the creation of decent and sustainable work.
[ Join Today ](https://smefoundersassociation.com/membership/founders-network-membership/)
![](https://smefoundersassociation.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/working-man-and-woman-resized-min.jpg)

Our Programs 
## Tailored to give you an edge
We have a variety of programs all tailored to give you all the skills and tools you and your organisation need to propel forward in today’s world.
####  Founders Network 
Gain exclusive access to growth resources, working capital and connections to peers and partner organisations.
[ Learn More ](https://smefoundersassociation.com/founders-network/)
####  Business Dialogues 
Learn how to communicate effectively as a business leader to create a positive impact both with your colleagues and your clients.
[ Learn More ](https://smefoundersassociation.com/business-dialogues)
####  Young Global Workforce Alliance 
Are you a young adult? Gain competence and compliance training to position you better for decent and sustainable work.
[ Learn More ](https://smefoundersassociation.com/ygwa)
####  Founders Network 
Gain exclusive access to growth resources, working capital and connections to peers and partner organisations.
[ Learn More ](https://smefoundersassociation.com/founders-network/)
####  Business Dialogues 
Learn how to communicate effectively as a business leader to create a positive impact both with your colleagues and your clients.
[ Learn More ](https://smefoundersassociation.com/business-dialogues)
####  Young Global Workforce Apprenticeship 
Are you a young adult? Gain competence and compliance training to position you better for decent and sustainable work.
[ Learn More ](https://smefoundersassociation.com/ygwa)
####  Founders Profit Academy 
A platform for founders looking for more insights, strategies, and knowledge to up their entrepreneurial game.
[ Learn More ](https://smefoundersassociation.com/fpa)
####  Founders Profit Academy 
A platform for founders looking for more insights, strategies, and knowledge to up their entrepreneurial game.
[ Learn More ](https://smefoundersassociation.com/fpa)
####  Catalyst 
Grow your business by getting access to friendly working capital and investment opportunities.
[ Learn More ](https://smefoundersassociation.com/catalyst)
####  Catalyst 
Grow your business by getting access to friendly working capital and investment opportunities.
[ Learn More ](https://smefoundersassociation.com/catalyst)
Our Services 
## We're here to help
We provide a number of services that help analyse where your business is currently, and advise on what is needed to take it forward. 
####  Business Advisory Services 
Accounting, finance, business planning, operations and more.
[ Learn More ](https://smefoundersassociation.com/business-advisory-services/)
####  Profit First Methodology 
We are trained and certified to guide you in maximizing your profits.
[ Learn More ](https://smefoundersassociation.com/profit-first-methodology/)
####  Business Assessments 
Analyse your business opportunities, risk and overall performance.
[ Learn More ](https://smefoundersassociation.com/business-assessments/)
####  Online Business Partners 
Outsource critical tasks enabling you to devote your full attention to your business.
[ Learn More ](https://smefoundersassociation.com/online-business-partners)

#### Privacy Overview
This website uses cookies to improve your experience while you navigate through the website. Out of these, the cookies that are categorized as necessary are stored on your browser as they are essential for the working of basic functionalities of the ...
Necessary 
Necessary
Always Enabled
Necessary cookies are absolutely essential for the website to function properly. These cookies ensure basic functionalities and security features of the website, anonymously.   
| Cookie  | Duration  | Description  |  
| --- | --- | --- |  
| cookielawinfo-checkbox-analytics  | 11 months  | This cookie is set by GDPR Cookie Consent plugin. The cookie is used to store the user consent for the cookies in the category "Analytics".  |  
| cookielawinfo-checkbox-functional  | 11 months  | The cookie is set by GDPR cookie consent to record the user consent for the cookies in the category "Functional".  |  
| cookielawinfo-checkbox-necessary  | 11 months  | This cookie is set by GDPR Cookie Consent plugin. The cookies is used to store the user consent for the cookies in the category "Necessary".  |  
| cookielawinfo-checkbox-others  | 11 months  | This cookie is set by GDPR Cookie Consent plugin. The cookie is used to store the user consent for the cookies in the category "Other.  |  
| cookielawinfo-checkbox-performance  | 11 months  | This cookie is set by GDPR Cookie Consent plugin. The cookie is used to store the user consent for the cookies in the category "Performance".  |  
| viewed_cookie_policy  | 11 months  | The cookie is set by the GDPR Cookie Consent plugin and is used to store whether or not user has consented to the use of cookies. It does not store any personal data.  |  
Functional 
Functional
Functional cookies help to perform certain functionalities like sharing the content of the website on social media platforms, collect feedbacks, and other third-party features. 
Performance 
Performance
Performance cookies are used to understand and analyze the key performance indexes of the website which helps in delivering a better user experience for the visitors. 
Analytics 
Analytics
Analytical cookies are used to understand how visitors interact with the website. These cookies help provide information on metrics the number of visitors, bounce rate, traffic source, etc. 
Advertisement 
Advertisement
Advertisement cookies are used to provide visitors with relevant ads and marketing campaigns. These cookies track visitors across websites and collect information to provide customized ads. 
Others 
Others
Other uncategorized cookies are those that are being analyzed and have not been classified into a category as yet. 
SAVE & ACCEPT
